module.name: tool
module.purpose: Top-level marix-tool crate (lib marix_tool) that defines the per-tool ToolProgram interface and compiles one executable per native tool program. tool_program.rs defines ToolProgram, the interface each native tool program implements (preview returns marix_common::ToolPreview with typed ToolInputSchema/ToolOutputSchema schema content, invoke runs the tool for a JSON call). native/ owns concrete tool programs (file/ and shell/), each implementing ToolProgram and exposing a cfg-gated SelectedTool alias behind a Cargo feature so exactly one tool is active per build. tool_main.rs is the shared binary entry whose main runs the compile-selected SelectedTool through a private run<T: ToolProgram> that reads process arguments and speaks the --preview/--run JSON protocol over stdout.

childModules.name: native
childModules.purpose: Concrete native tool programs grouped by category: filesystem tools under file/ and shell command execution under shell/. Native previews wrap schema constants in typed ToolInputSchema/ToolOutputSchema content wrappers and invoke() implementations perform real IO and return JSON results.
